case_title: TONEY BEFFORD VS. JOHN STEWART CO.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,000.00 FILED BY BEFFORD, TONEY AS TO DEFENDANT JOHN STEWART CO. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-16-2024 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-16-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-16-2024 BY VISITING JUDGE. PLAINTIFF TONEY BEFFORD IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JOHN STEWART IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY ROMINA ORIBELLO. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: SYLVIA HUSING; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-16-2024 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BEFFORD, TONEY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JOHN STEWART CO. $750.00 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $780.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT JOHN STEWART CO.
